unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "compound_shapes"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_compound_shapes();
}

const ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO: &[u8] = include_bytes!("compound_shapes.entrypoints.pb");
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[6, 4];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8, 8];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[10];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}

pub type Bits8 = u8;
pub type Bits16 = u16;

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input0 {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: [Bits16; 2],
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input1 {
    pub field0: Bits16,
    pub field1: [Bits8; 2],
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct OutputField1 {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: Bits16,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {
    pub field0: [Bits16; 2],
    pub field1: OutputField1,
    pub field2: [Bits8; 2],
}

const INPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
];
const INPUT1_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 3,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
];
const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 6,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 9,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
];

fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 6);
    dst.fill(0);
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize],
        &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 3);
}

fn encode_input_1(_value: &Input1, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 4);
    dst.fill(0);
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT1_LAYOUT[0usize],
        &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT1_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT1_LAYOUT.len(), 3);
}

fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 10);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + index_0],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        }),
        field1: OutputField1 {
            field0: {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
                xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            },
            field1: {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
                xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2 + 1],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            },
        },
        field2: std::array::from_fn(|index_1| {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4 + index_1],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 6);
    output
}

pub fn descriptor() -> xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor<'static> {
    unsafe {
        xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor::from_raw_parts_unchecked(
            ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO,
            __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_compound_shapes as *const () as usize,
            xlsynth::AotEntrypointMetadata {
                symbol: "compound_shapes".to_string(),
                input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                temp_buffer_size: 0,
                temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
            },
        )
    }
}

pub struct Runner {
    inner: xlsynth::AotRunner<'static>,
}

impl Runner {
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: xlsynth::AotRunner::new(descriptor())?,
        })
    }

    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        lhs: &Input0,
        rhs: &Input1,
    ) -> Result<xlsynth::AotRunResult<Output>, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(lhs, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(rhs, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run_with_events(|inner| {
            let output = decode_output_0(inner.output(0));
            output
        })
    }

    pub fn run(&mut self, lhs: &Input0, rhs: &Input1) -> Result<Output, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(lhs, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(rhs, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run()?;
        let output = decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0));
        Ok(output)
    }
}

pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
    Runner::new()
}
